title: glochidion lalae
intro: Glochidion lalae, also known as the 'Pai Pai' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glochidion lalae include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of fever and diarrhea, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
